title: AntiInvis
description: A lightweight client-side mod that renders invisible players and mobs as translucent ghosts. Fully customizable via ModMenu!
body:
# 👁️ AntiInvis (Fabric)

**AntiInvis** is a lightweight, purely client-side utility mod that prevents players and mobs from completely disappearing when using Invisibility potions. Instead of becoming completely invisible, they will be rendered as **translucent ghosts**, allowing you to easily track them down!

## ✨ Features
* **Translucent Rendering:** Invisible entities are rendered semi-transparently (like spectators), so you can distinguish them from regular players.
* **Fully Customizable:** Use the built-in ModMenu integration to independently toggle the visibility of players or mobs.
* **Quick Keybind:** Press `I` (default) to quickly toggle the entire mod on or off in-game.
* **Client-Side Only:** Works on any vanilla server, mini-game network, or anarchy server. No server installation required!
* **Multi-language:** Fully translated into English and Russian.

## ⚙️ Requirements
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional, but highly recommended for settings)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required for the settings menu)

⚠️ *Disclaimer: Using this mod on strict competitive servers (like Hypixel or similar) may be considered an unfair advantage. Use it at your own risk!*
